Defenses are open to the public, and society members are especially encouraged to attend in support of our seniors. The full schedule of dates and topics will be posted outside the dean's office by Friday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To request that members volunteer at the thesis defenses
options.B: To explain how to write a successful honors thesis
options.C: To inform members of the upcoming defense schedule
options.D: To collect feedback on last semester's defenses

questions.explanation: 通告核心是分享本学期八位senior答辩的日程，并鼓励到场支持，主旨即告知答辩安排。A、B、D均与实际内容不符。

questions.stem: Where will the defenses take place?

options.A: The Whittaker Building
options.B: The dean's office
options.C: The library auditorium
options.D: The Honors Society lounge

questions.explanation: 通告明确说'in the Whittaker Building'，即Whittaker楼。B是张贴日程表的位置而非答辩地点；C、D均未被提到。

items.situation: spring symposium with limited seats and coursework prerequisites
items.announcement: Good morning, undergraduates. The Sociology Department is pleased to announce its annual Spring Symposium on Urban Inequality, scheduled for March 22 in Carlton Hall. Six visiting scholars will present new research in three back-to-back panels from 9 AM to 4 PM. Because seating is limited to seventy attendees, students must register through the department portal by March 8 to be considered. Priority will be given to students who have completed at least one upper-level sociology course or who can provide a brief statement of relevant research interest. Selected students will be notified by email no later than March 12.

questions.stem: How will students be selected for attendance?

options.A: By a first-come, first-served registration system
options.B: By professor nomination from each sociology course
options.C: By payment of a registration fee before the deadline
options.D: By prior coursework or a statement of research interest

questions.explanation: 通告说优先权给予已修过upper-level社会学课程或能提供research interest声明的学生。A与'limited seats + selected'选拔机制不符；B、C均无依据。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who register before the deadline?

options.A: They will receive priority over upper-level sociology majors
options.B: They are not guaranteed a seat even after registering
options.C: They will be required to present their own research
options.D: They must attend all three panels to receive credit

questions.explanation: 由于座位仅七十个且需要'be considered'后由部门'selected'，可推断注册不等于一定入选。A与通告中优先标准相反；C、D均无依据。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on Whitfield and Brookhaven scholarship applications
items.announcement: Attention juniors and seniors. The Financial Aid Office will host a scholarship application workshop on Thursday, November 9, at 5:30 PM in Brewster Lounge, Room 110. Senior advisor Mr. Tanaka will walk students through the application timeline for the Whitfield Foundation and Brookhaven Trust scholarships, both of which open for submissions on December 1. Attendees should bring a current resume and an unofficial transcript. Students are encouraged to draft personal statements ahead of the workshop, as Mr. Tanaka will offer individual feedback during the final thirty minutes. Both scholarships require academic transcripts and a faculty recommendation that must reach the office by January 15.

questions.stem: What should attendees bring to the workshop?

options.A: A current resume and an unofficial transcript
options.B: A printed copy of last semester's grade report
options.C: A signed faculty recommendation letter
options.D: A draft of the personal statement only

questions.explanation: 通告明确说'bring a current resume and an unofficial transcript'。B、C都不在bring范围；D不完整——通告说鼓励但未要求带，且工作人员要求的是简历+成绩单。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who skip drafting a personal statement?

options.A: They will be ineligible to apply for the scholarships
options.B: They will be required to submit their application later
options.C: They will miss out on the individual feedback session
options.D: They will need to attend a follow-up workshop in December

questions.explanation: 通告说Mr. Tanaka在最后30分钟给personal statement提供个别反馈，可推断没准备草稿的学生将错过个别反馈。A过度推断；B无依据；D无相关信息。

items.situation: recreation center extending hours during finals week
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. I'm pleased to announce that the campus recreation center will extend its hours during finals week to support your study breaks. Starting this Monday, the center will remain open until midnight, instead of our usual 10 p.m. closing time. This extended schedule will run through next Friday. Please note that you must bring your valid student ID to enter the facility after 9 p.m. We hope this helps you manage stress and stay healthy during exams.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce extended hours at the recreation center
options.B: To remind students about finals week schedule
options.C: To promote a new fitness class at the center
options.D: To inform students about a temporary closure

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告的核心是宣布健身中心在期末考试周延长开放时间。B选项太狭窄，期末考试日程只是背景。C选项错误，公告没有提到任何新健身课程。D选项与事实相反，公告说的是延长开放时间，而不是关闭。

questions.stem: What must students do to enter the recreation center after 9 p.m.?

options.A: Sign up for a membership online
options.B: Show a printed schedule of their exams
options.C: Bring their valid student ID
options.D: Arrive before 10 p.m.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告明确说明晚上9点后进入需要有效的学生证。A选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到会员注册。B选项是错误细节，公告没有要求出示考试日程。D选项与事实相反，公告说的是延长到午夜，而不是要求10点前到达。

items.situation: renowned scientist giving a guest lecture on campus
items.announcement: I'm excited to announce that Dr. Elena Torres, a leading climate scientist from Stanford University, will deliver a guest lecture this Thursday at 3 p.m. in Waldman Auditorium. Her talk is titled 'The Future of Our Planet: Climate Solutions for the Next Decade.' This event is free and open to all students and faculty. However, seats are limited, so we encourage you to arrive early. Please bring your student ID for entry. A brief Q&A session will follow the lecture.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise a new climate research project
options.B: To announce a guest lecture by a climate scientist
options.C: To require students to attend a lecture
options.D: To discuss the effects of climate change

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告的主要目的是宣布一位著名气候科学家将举办客座讲座。A选项错误，公告没有提到任何研究项目。C选项错误，公告是鼓励参加，而非强制要求。D选项错误，讲座内容涉及气候变化解决方案，但公告本身不是讨论气候变化。

questions.stem: What are attendees advised to do?

options.A: Register for the lecture online
options.B: Read the speaker's book beforehand
options.C: Bring a notebook for notes
options.D: Arrive early because seats are limited

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告提到座位有限，建议尽早到达。A选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有要求在线注册。B选项是错误细节，公告没有要求提前阅读。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到笔记本。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Due to the upcoming summer break, the Main Street Dining Hall will transition to summer hours starting next Monday, June 5th. The dining hall will be open from 7:30 a.m. to 7:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, and will be closed on weekends. Breakfast and lunch will be served as usual, but dinner service will end at 6:30 p.m. Please note that meal swipes will still be accepted during all operating hours. We appreciate your understanding as we adjust our schedule for the summer.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new menu at the dining hall
options.B: To inform about a temporary closure for renovations
options.C: To notify students about changes to dining hours
options.D: To remind students to use meal swipes

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告的核心是通知学生食堂将切换到夏季营业时间。A选项错误，公告没有提到新菜单。B选项错误，公告说的是时间调整，而非关闭装修。D选项太狭窄，使用餐券只是公告中提到的一个细节，不是主要目的。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the dining hall's current hours?

options.A: They are likely longer than the summer hours
options.B: They include weekend service
options.C: They start earlier than 7:30 a.m.
options.D: They end after 7:00 p.m.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告提到夏季时间从7:30到19:00，周末关闭，暗示当前时间可能更长（比如更晚关门或周末开放）。B选项是字面复述，从公告可推断夏季周末关闭，但当前时间可能包括周末，但B选项直接陈述当前时间包括周末服务，这并非直接推断。A更合理：夏季时间缩短，因此当前时间更长。C选项过度推断，无法推断当前开始时间是否更早。D选项可能正确，但A更明确，因为公告提到夏季时间结束于19:00，暗示当前可能更晚。

items.situation: spring academic symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: We're pleased to announce that the Spring Academic Symposium will take place on April 20th in the Student Union Ballroom. This year's theme is 'Innovations in Interdisciplinary Research.' Due to high demand, attendance is limited to the first 200 students who register. To be eligible, you must have a minimum GPA of 3.5 and submit a brief statement of interest by March 1st. Registration opens next Monday at 9 a.m. on the symposium website. Successful applicants will be notified by email.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the theme of the symposium
options.B: To remind students about the deadline
options.C: To explain the registration process
options.D: To announce the symposium and its eligibility requirements

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告的主要目的是宣布研讨会及其资格要求（GPA、兴趣陈述）。A选项太狭窄，主题只是公告的一部分。B选项太狭窄，截止日期只是细节。C选项虽然涉及注册流程，但公告还包括资格要求和日期等，D更全面地概括了公告目的。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the symposium?

options.A: It is open to all students regardless of GPA
options.B: It is likely to be very competitive to attend
options.C: It will feature only one speaker
options.D: It is free for all registered students

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告提到名额有限（前200名），且有GPA要求，表明竞争激烈。A选项错误，公告明确要求GPA 3.5以上。C选项过度推断，公告未提及演讲者数量。D选项过度推断，公告未提及费用。

items.situation: health insurance enrollment information session
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the university's health insurance enrollment period ends this Friday, March 10th. For those who still have questions, we'll be holding an information session tomorrow at 2 p.m. in room 302 of the Student Services Building. A representative from the insurance provider will be present to answer your questions. You must bring your student ID to enter the session. Please note that late enrollment will not be accepted after the deadline.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a deadline extension for enrollment
options.B: To remind students about the enrollment deadline and an info session
options.C: To explain the benefits of the health insurance plan
options.D: To require all students to enroll in health insurance

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告提醒学生注册截止日期，并通知有信息会。A选项错误，公告说截止日期是本周五，没有延期。C选项错误，公告没有解释保险福利。D选项错误，公告没有强制要求注册。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the information session?

options.A: It is mandatory for all students
options.B: It is intended for students with questions about insurance
options.C: It will provide enrollment forms
options.D: It will be held after the deadline

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告提到信息会是为仍有疑问的学生举办的，因此可推断其目的是解答疑问。A选项过度推断，公告没有说强制参加。C选项过度推断，公告未提供注册表格。D选项错误，信息会在截止日期前（明天）举行。

items.situation: spring academic symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: Good morning, students. I'm pleased to announce that registration is now open for the Spring Linguistics Symposium, which will take place in Whitman Hall on Friday, April 24, from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. This year's symposium is limited to forty undergraduate participants because of the small-group discussion format. To register, you must have completed at least one upper-level seminar in linguistics. Please submit your registration through the department portal by Wednesday, April 15, along with the name of your faculty sponsor. Boxed lunches will be provided at no cost to confirmed attendees.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the opening of registration for an academic symposium
options.B: To explain how to apply for upper-level seminar courses
options.C: To advertise free boxed lunches in Whitman Hall
options.D: To recruit faculty sponsors for student research projects

questions.explanation: 通告核心是研讨会注册已开放。B借用seminar做表面陷阱，但通告不是介绍课程。C只是次要细节。D完全跑题。

questions.stem: What is required for a student to register?

options.A: Department portal account from a previous symposium
options.B: A completed senior thesis in linguistics
options.C: Completion of at least one upper-level linguistics seminar
options.D: Approval from the dean of undergraduate studies

questions.explanation: 通告明确说需完成至少一门高级研讨课。A借用'portal'词汇但是凭空捏造。B改变了真实要求。D是话题相关但通告未提。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Attention students and faculty. New cardiovascular equipment will be installed at the Crawford Recreation Center beginning Monday, May 4. As a result, the cardio room on the second floor will be temporarily closed from May 4 through May 8, and the rowing machines will not be available during this period. Members can still use the weight floor, the indoor track, and the lap pool throughout the week. Please be aware that the staff will offer two demonstration sessions of the new machines on Saturday, May 9, at 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. Pre-registration through the rec center app is encouraged but not required.

questions.stem: What will be unavailable during the installation period?

options.A: Both the weight floor and the indoor track
options.B: The second-floor cardio room and rowing machines
options.C: The indoor swimming pool for several days
options.D: The locker room facilities in the basement

questions.explanation: 通告明确指出二楼cardio room关闭和划船机不可用。A颠倒事实——这些仍然开放。C同样与通告相反。D完全没提到。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the new equipment?

options.A: The cost will be added to member fees this semester
options.B: The machines will replace only the rowing equipment
options.C: Demonstrations will be limited to certified members only
options.D: Staff want users to learn how the machines work properly

questions.explanation: 通告提供两次演示场次，可推知工作人员希望用户学会使用。A是无关推论。B过度推论——通告未说只换划船机。C颠倒事实——是预注册建议而非限制。

items.situation: end-of-semester academic showcase with awards
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the End-of-Semester Engineering Showcase will take place in the Daniels Atrium on Thursday, December 11, from 1 p.m. to 5 p.m. All senior-design teams must register their projects through the engineering office by Monday, December 8. The showcase will feature poster presentations, live demonstrations, and faculty judging in three categories. Cash prizes of three hundred, two hundred, and one hundred dollars will be awarded to the top three teams. We strongly recommend that team members arrive by 12:30 p.m. to set up their displays. Light refreshments will be served throughout the afternoon.

questions.stem: What will be awarded at the showcase?

options.A: Letters of recommendation from the dean
options.B: Internship offers from corporate sponsors
options.C: Cash prizes for the top three teams
options.D: Graduate-school waivers for senior students

questions.explanation: 通告明确列出三百、两百、一百美元的现金奖。A、B、D都是话题相关但通告未提。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker suggest arriving by 12:30 p.m.?

options.A: Teams need time to assemble their displays before judging
options.B: Refreshments will be served before the main event
options.C: Late arrivals will be disqualified from the competition
options.D: Faculty judges will give a short opening lecture

questions.explanation: 通告说'arrive by 12:30 to set up their displays'，1点正式开始，可推知是为了布置展示。B借用refreshments做无关推论。C过度推论。D完全没提及。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Welcome, everyone. The Student Activities Board is excited to host its annual Outdoor Movie Night on the main quad this Saturday, May 16, at 8:30 p.m. This year's feature will be 'Pacific Crossing,' a documentary about ocean exploration. We will be providing limited folding chairs, so we strongly encourage attendees to bring their own blankets or beach towels for seating on the grass. Free popcorn and lemonade will be available at the refreshment tent near the fountain. Please note that the event will move indoors to the Hartley Gymnasium in the event of rain.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for the Student Activities Board
options.B: To advertise a new documentary release in theaters
options.C: To explain weather policies for outdoor campus events
options.D: To invite students to an annual outdoor film screening

questions.explanation: 通告核心是邀请学生参加年度户外电影。A完全跑题。B错——是校内放映，不是影院发行。C只是次要细节。

questions.stem: What are attendees encouraged to bring?

options.A: Folding chairs from their dorm rooms
options.B: A blanket or beach towel for grass seating
options.C: Their own popcorn and snacks
options.D: A waterproof jacket in case of rain

questions.explanation: 通告说带毯子或浴巾在草地上坐。A借用折叠椅词汇但是反——主办方提供折叠椅。C颠倒事实——爆米花是免费提供。D是话题相关但未要求带。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The Career Services Office will be hosting LinkedIn Profile Photo Day this coming Thursday, October 22, in the Carver Career Center, Room 110. Professional photographers will be on site from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. taking complimentary headshots for any registered student. Sign-ups must be completed through the career services portal by Tuesday at noon. Please come dressed in business or business-casual attire. We strongly recommend looking at the sample poses on our website beforehand. Walk-ins will only be accepted if photographer time slots remain available at the end of the day.

questions.stem: What must students do before Tuesday at noon?

options.A: Sign up through the career services portal
options.B: Submit their existing LinkedIn profile for review
options.C: Email the photographer with their preferred time
options.D: Buy formal attire from the campus bookstore

questions.explanation: 通告明确说周二中午前在career services portal注册。B凭空捏造，通告没要求提交profile。C改变了真实流程。D是话题相关但通告未要求。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about walk-in participants?

options.A: They must pay an additional photo session fee
options.B: They will receive priority over registered students
options.C: They may not get a slot if registrations fill the day
options.D: They will be photographed in the hallway instead

questions.explanation: 通告说walk-ins只在场次有空时才接受，可推知如果注册满了walk-ins可能轮不到。A过度推论。B完全相反。D完全无关。

items.announcement: Attention students. Due to weekend roof repairs, the main entrance of Hopkins Library will be closed from Friday, October 4 at 7:00 p.m. through Sunday, October 6 at 8:00 a.m. During this period, please use the side entrance on Oak Avenue. Twenty-four-hour study spaces and group rooms remain available with a valid student ID. Returns can still be dropped off at the drive-up box outside the Oak Avenue door. We're sorry for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience while we keep the building safe.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a temporary entrance change due to repairs
options.B: To request student volunteers for library projects
options.C: To advertise a new twenty-four-hour study space
options.D: To explain a permanent change to library hours

questions.explanation: 通告主要告知因维修临时改入口。其他选项与文本不符。

questions.stem: What should students do during the repair period?

options.A: Avoid coming to the library entirely
options.B: Use the side entrance on Oak Avenue
options.C: Return all borrowed books before Friday
options.D: Schedule appointments for group rooms in advance

questions.explanation: 通告明确要求使用橡树大街侧门。其他选项与文本不符。

items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Economics Department is pleased to announce a guest lecture by Dr. Helena Park on Tuesday, November 12, at 4:30 p.m. in Linden Hall, Room 207. Dr. Park will speak about labor market shifts in coastal regions. Seating is limited, so please reserve a spot through the department website by Friday, November 8. A short reception will follow the lecture, and refreshments will be provided. We strongly encourage Economics majors and minors to attend, as the topic connects directly to material covered in upper-level courses.

questions.stem: What is the announcement primarily about?

options.A: A scholarship for Economics majors
options.B: A guest lecture and reservation deadline
options.C: A required examination in November
options.D: A change to the Economics department office hours

questions.explanation: 通告主要介绍客座讲座和预约截止日期。其他选项与内容不符。

questions.stem: What must students do to attend?

options.A: Pay a small registration fee in person
options.B: Submit a research summary to the department
options.C: Reserve a seat through the department website
options.D: Bring a printed copy of their major declaration

questions.explanation: 通告说必须通过院系网站预定座位。其他选项与文本不符。

items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The campus shuttle route along North Ridge Road will be temporarily rerouted starting Monday, September 16, due to construction near the engineering complex. Buses will instead travel along Maple Street and stop at the South Quad. Service will continue every fifteen minutes during peak hours and every thirty minutes after 6:00 p.m. Please allow extra time for your commute during the first week, as drivers adjust to the new route. The original route is expected to resume by early October.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

items.announcement: This is a reminder that spring course registration closes this Friday, December 6, at 11:59 p.m. Students who have not yet selected courses should meet with their academic advisor before submitting. Late registration will reopen on Monday, December 9, but a $25 late fee will apply to each course added after the deadline. Please check the registration portal for any holds on your account, as unresolved holds will prevent you from enrolling. The advising office in Sutton Hall offers walk-in hours from 1:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m. all week.

More than thirty student clubs will host booths featuring food, music, and crafts from around the world. Admission is free, and a free shuttle will run from the Visitor Center every twenty minutes. Volunteers are still needed for set-up and clean-up shifts. If you'd like to help, please sign up through the Student Life portal by Friday, April 18. We hope to see you there.

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Campus Activities Office is excited to announce that our annual Outdoor Movie Night will take place this Friday, October 20, on the south lawn behind the library. The featured film will be a recent international documentary about urban beekeeping. Seating is blanket-style, so please bring your own blanket or low folding chair, as no rental chairs will be available this year. Doors and snack tables open at seven fifteen, and the projection begins promptly at eight o'clock once natural light fades. In case of rain, the screening will move indoors to the Waldman Auditorium with the same start time.

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what must students bring with them?

options.A: Their own blanket or low folding chair for seating
options.B: A printed ticket purchased from the activities office
options.C: A handheld flashlight to use during the screening
options.D: A reusable cup for the snack table refreshments

questions.explanation: 公告明确指出由于今年不提供租用椅子，须自备毯子或低折叠椅，故 A 对。B、C、D 都未提及。

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the announcement?

options.A: The projection equipment cannot operate when natural light is still strong
options.B: Snack tables will remain closed during the film projection itself
options.C: The screening time will not change even if there is rain
options.D: The featured documentary will be shown only to graduate students

questions.explanation: 公告说雨天移至室内但起始时间不变，故 C 可推。A 把'自然光褪去开始'过度推断为设备无法运行；B、D 无依据。

items.situation: campus sustainability cleanup day
items.announcement: Attention students. The Sustainability Office is hosting our quarterly campus cleanup day this Saturday, October 21, beginning at nine in the morning. Volunteers should gather at the fountain plaza in front of Briarwood Hall. We'll provide gloves, trash grabbers, and a complimentary lunch from the dining commons for everyone who participates. Please register by Thursday evening through the sustainability portal so we can confirm head counts and pizza orders. No prior experience is required, and family members and friends are welcome to join as long as they also register on the portal in advance.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a renovation of Briarwood Hall fountain plaza
options.B: To recruit volunteers for a quarterly campus cleanup day
options.C: To advertise a new course on sustainability and the environment
options.D: To remind students about an upcoming dining commons closure

questions.explanation: 公告整体在号召志愿者参与季度清洁日，B 对。A、C、D 均与公告核心目的不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what will participants receive?

options.A: Cash payment delivered after their shift ends
options.B: Credit toward a future sustainability course offering
options.C: Discounted tickets to the next dining commons event
options.D: Gloves, trash grabbers, and a complimentary lunch

questions.explanation: 公告列出参与者得到手套、垃圾抓取器和餐厅免费午餐，故 D 对。A、B、C 都未提及。

items.situation: student lounge or study area closing for pipe/ceiling repair
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to a recent leak in the third-floor ceiling, the Harrington student lounge will be closed for repair from Monday, November 6, through Wednesday, November 8. During the closure, the alternative study area in the basement of Anderson Hall will extend its hours from seven in the morning until midnight. Vending machines and the printing station in the lounge will be temporarily unavailable, but a smaller print station will be set up just outside the Anderson Hall study area for the duration of the closure. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain why ceiling leaks have become more common on campus
options.B: To recruit students to assist with the lounge repair work
options.C: To inform the campus community that the lounge will close for repair
options.D: To advertise newly added vending machines in Anderson Hall

questions.explanation: 公告核心是通知关闭和替代方案，C 对。A、B、D 均与公告意图不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what hours will the Anderson Hall study area keep during the closure?

options.A: From seven in the morning until midnight
options.B: From nine in the morning until six in the evening
options.C: From eight in the morning until nine at night
options.D: Around the clock with no scheduled break

questions.explanation: 公告明确说'extend its hours from seven in the morning until midnight'，故 A 对。其余时段均与公告不符。

items.situation: recreation center extending hours during finals week
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Greenhill Recreation Center will extend its operating hours during finals week, from Monday, December 11, through Friday, December 15. The cardio room and weight floor will open at five in the morning and remain available until two in the morning the following day. Stress relief programming, including free yoga, mindfulness sessions, and guided stretching, will run every evening at seven and nine in studio B. Students do not need to register in advance for those sessions, but mats should be picked up at the front desk fifteen minutes before each class begins.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the permanent closure of studio B during finals
options.B: To advertise paid personal-training sessions at the front desk
options.C: To explain why mat rentals require advance online registration
options.D: To inform students that the recreation center will extend hours and stress-relief programs during finals

questions.explanation: 公告通告延长营业时间并增加减压课程，D 对。A、B 与公告事实矛盾；C 凭空发挥。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the yoga and mindfulness sessions?

options.A: Each session has a strict twenty-person attendance cap
options.B: Students can simply show up after picking up a mat
options.C: Sessions will be canceled if fewer than five attend
options.D: Students must pay a small fee to access studio B

questions.explanation: 公告说不需提前注册，只需提前 15 分钟取垫子，可推 B。A、C、D 均无依据。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students. Due to ongoing construction near the science quad, the campus shuttle will follow a temporary route starting Monday, October 16. The shuttle will skip the science quad stop and will instead stop at the lower library entrance and the visitor parking lot. The Linden Avenue stop is unaffected. Buses will run every twelve minutes between seven in the morning and ten at night. Please plan an extra five minutes if you usually transfer at the science quad. Live route updates and arrival times can be checked on the campus mobility app.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a temporary change to the shuttle route
options.B: To request student feedback on shuttle stop locations
options.C: To announce a complete shutdown of the shuttle service
options.D: To advertise a new mobile application from the city government

questions.explanation: 公告通告临时改道，A 对。B 凭空发挥；C 与公告事实相反；D 与公告意图不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what should riders allow extra time for?

options.A: Buying a new shuttle pass at the lower library entrance
options.B: Completing a survey on the campus mobility app
options.C: Transferring at the discontinued science quad stop
options.D: Walking around the closed Linden Avenue intersection

questions.explanation: 公告建议在原来科学方场换乘的乘客多留 5 分钟，故 C 对。A、B、D 都未提及。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. We're excited to announce that the first-ever Student Art Market will be held in the central quad this Saturday from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. Local student artists will sell handmade prints, ceramics, and jewelry, and a portion of every sale supports the campus arts fund. If you'd like to sell your own work, you must reserve a table by Wednesday through the Arts Office portal, since spaces are limited to twenty vendors. Please be aware that the quad fountain area will be roped off to make room for the booths. We hope you'll stop by and support your fellow students.

questions.stem: What must students do in order to sell their own work at the market?

options.A: Reserve a table through the Arts Office portal by Wednesday
options.B: Donate a finished piece to the campus arts fund
options.C: Set up a booth near the quad fountain area
options.D: Pay a vendor registration fee at the Arts Office

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说明想摆摊卖作品的学生必须在周三前通过艺术办公室门户预订桌位。B选项是错误细节，公告说的是每笔销售的一部分支持艺术基金，而不是必须捐赠成品。C选项是误置细节，喷泉区被围起来腾出空间，并不是让学生在那里摆摊。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到任何注册费用。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the table reservations?

options.A: They are reserved only for art majors

items.situation: student research poster session open to all majors
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Undergraduate Research Poster Session will be held next Thursday at 1 p.m. in the Bradley Library atrium. We want to stress that this session welcomes students from every major, not only the sciences, so projects from history, art, and economics are all encouraged. There's no need to have finished results; works in progress are perfectly fine to present. Faculty members and graduate mentors will circulate to give friendly feedback on your posters. To take part, please upload a one-paragraph project summary to the research portal by this Monday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the winners of a research competition
options.B: To invite students from all majors to a poster session
options.C: To require science majors to present completed research
options.D: To describe how to apply for a research grant

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告的核心目的是邀请所有专业的学生参加海报展示会。A选项是错误目的，公告没有宣布任何比赛获奖者。C选项与事实相反，公告强调欢迎所有专业且接受进行中的项目，并非只针对理科或要求已完成的研究。D选项是错误目的，公告完全没有提到申请研究经费。

questions.stem: What must students do to take part in the session?

options.A: Present only fully completed research results
options.B: Attend a mandatory orientation with their mentor
options.C: Reserve a poster board at the library front desk
options.D: Upload a one-paragraph project summary by Monday

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告明确要求参与者在本周一前向研究门户上传一段项目简介。A选项与事实相反，公告说进行中的项目也可以展示，不必是已完成的成果。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到任何强制性的说明会。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到在图书馆前台预订海报板。

items.situation: spring linguistics symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: On behalf of the Linguistics Society, I'm pleased to announce our Spring Symposium on language and the brain, taking place on April 12th in Hartwell Hall. Because the venue is small, attendance is capped at one hundred students, and seats tend to go fast. To register, you must have already completed the Introduction to Linguistics course, since the sessions assume that background. Registration opens this Friday at noon on the Society's website, and we'll email a confirmation once your spot is secured. We look forward to a lively day of talks and discussion.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To summarize the findings of recent brain research
options.B: To remind members to renew their society dues
options.C: To announce a symposium and its registration requirements
options.D: To recruit student volunteers to run the event

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告的主要目的是宣布春季研讨会并说明其注册要求（名额上限、先修课程、注册时间）。A选项是错误目的，公告并没有总结脑科学的研究发现，只是说明了研讨会主题。B选项是错误目的，公告没有提到续交会费。D选项是错误目的，公告没有招募志愿者。

questions.stem: What is required in order to register for the symposium?

options.A: Having completed the Introduction to Linguistics course
options.B: Maintaining a minimum grade point average of 3.5
options.C: Submitting a short writing sample to the society
options.D: Being an officially enrolled linguistics major

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确要求注册者必须已经修完语言学导论课程，因为讲座默认听众具备该基础。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到任何GPA要求。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有要求提交写作样本。D选项是错误细节，公告要求的是修过某门课程，而非必须是语言学专业的注册学生。

items.situation: grand reopening of a renovated performance hall
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. After nearly a year of renovations, the Mercer Performance Hall will hold its grand reopening this Friday at 7 p.m. The updated hall features improved acoustics, new seating, and a fully accessible main entrance. To celebrate, the university orchestra will give a free opening concert, and light refreshments will be served in the lobby afterward. Doors open at 6:30 p.m., and seating is first-come, first-served, so we recommend arriving a little early. We're delighted to welcome the campus community back to this wonderful space.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain why the hall was closed for repairs
options.B: To recruit musicians for the university orchestra
options.C: To warn that the hall will close for renovations
options.D: To announce the grand reopening of the renovated hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告的核心是宣布翻修后的表演厅将盛大重新开放。A选项太狭窄，公告只是简短提到翻修一年，重点并不是解释关闭原因。B选项是错误目的，公告没有招募乐团成员。C选项与事实相反，公告说的是重新开放，而非即将关闭翻修。

questions.stem: What is true about the opening concert?

options.A: Tickets must be purchased in advance online
options.B: It is free and seating is first-come, first-served
options.C: It is open only to music department students
options.D: It will be held outdoors on the main quad

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说明开幕音乐会是免费的，且座位是先到先得。A选项是错误细节，公告说的是先到先得，没有要求提前在线购票。C选项是错误细节，公告欢迎整个校园社区，而非仅限音乐系学生。D选项是误置细节，音乐会在表演厅内举行，而非户外的中央广场。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Green Roots Club is recruiting volunteers for our annual spring cleanup of the campus community garden this Sunday, beginning at 8:30 a.m. behind Lincoln Hall. We'll be pulling weeds, turning over the soil, and planting this season's herb beds. Tools and gloves are all provided, but please wear closed-toe shoes and clothing you don't mind getting muddy. No gardening experience is needed, and you're welcome to come for just an hour or stay the whole morning. If you plan to join us, please sign up on the club's page by Friday so we can prepare enough snacks.

questions.stem: What are volunteers asked to wear to the event?

options.A: Closed-toe shoes and clothing that can get muddy
options.B: The official Green Roots Club t-shirt
options.C: Gardening gloves brought from home
options.D: A bright safety vest provided at sign-in

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确要求志愿者穿包脚趾的鞋和不怕弄脏的衣服。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到俱乐部T恤。C选项是错误细节，手套由活动提供，并非要求自带。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告完全没有提到安全背心。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker ask people to sign up by Friday?

options.A: Because volunteers must complete a safety training first
options.B: Because only a limited number of people can attend
options.C: To help organizers prepare enough snacks for everyone
options.D: Because experienced gardeners are given priority

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说请在周五前报名，以便准备足够的零食，因此可推断报名是为了帮助组织者准备食物。A选项是过度推断，公告没有提到任何安全培训。B选项是无关推断，公告没有说人数有限制，反而欢迎大家随意参加。D选项与事实相反，公告说明无需园艺经验，并未给有经验者优先权。

items.situation: spring data-science symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. As president of the Data Science Society, I'm pleased to announce our Spring Analytics Symposium, taking place next Thursday at 3 p.m. in Hartwell Hall, Room 204. We've invited three industry researchers to lead hands-on workshops, but seating is capped at forty because each participant gets a personal coding station. To register, you'll need to have completed at least one introductory statistics course, since the sessions move quickly and assume that background. We won't be able to admit walk-ins, so please confirm your spot through the society's portal by this Tuesday. Light refreshments will be provided, and we'd love to see a full room.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite eligible students to register for a limited-seat symposium
options.B: To describe the research findings of three industry speakers
options.C: To recruit new officers for the Data Science Society
options.D: To cancel an introductory statistics course this spring

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告的核心是宣布春季分析研讨会并邀请符合条件的学生在周二前报名，因为名额有限。B选项过于狭窄，公告只是提到三位嘉宾会带工作坊，并未介绍他们的研究成果。C选项是错误目的，公告完全没有提到招募社团干部。D选项是相反意图，公告把统计课作为报名前提，而不是宣布取消该课程。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who have not taken a statistics course?

items.situation: parking lot closure for alumni weekend with shuttle alternative
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Because of this weekend's Homecoming Alumni Reunion, the north-side parking structure and Lot F will be closed to regular permit holders beginning Friday at noon. These areas are being reserved for registered alumni guests throughout the event. To keep everyone moving, we'll run an expanded shuttle loop from the West Stadium overflow lot, with buses arriving every eight minutes from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. Please don't leave vehicles in the closed lots after the deadline, as they may be ticketed. Normal parking access will resume on Monday morning. Thanks for your patience during the celebration.

questions.stem: Where can students park while the north-side lots are closed?

options.A: In Lot F with a temporary alumni pass
options.B: At the West Stadium overflow lot served by shuttles
options.C: Inside the north-side parking structure after noon
options.D: Along the main campus loop road on Saturday

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说明在封闭期间会从西体育场溢出停车场开通加密班车，供大家停车换乘。A选项是错误细节，Lot F是保留给已登记的校友嘉宾的，不是凭临时通行证给学生用。C选项是相反意图，北侧停车楼正是被关闭的区域。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到在校园环路沿线停车。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about vehicles left in the closed lots after the deadline?

options.A: They will be moved to the overflow lot for free
options.B: They will be granted alumni guest status automatically
options.C: They can remain until Monday without consequence
options.D: Their owners risk receiving a parking ticket

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告提醒不要在截止时间后把车留在封闭停车场，否则可能被开罚单，由此可推断车主有被罚款的风险。A选项是无关推断，公告没有说会免费把车移走。B选项是过度推断，公告并未说留下的车会自动获得校友嘉宾身份。C选项是错误细节，正常停车要到周一才恢复，而留在封闭区的车会有后果。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Financial Aid Office is hosting a free scholarship application workshop this coming Wednesday at 4 p.m. in the Student Services Center, Room 110. A coordinator will walk you through finding scholarships, writing strong personal statements, and avoiding common application mistakes. This session is open to all undergraduates, whether you're a first-year student or about to graduate. To get the most out of it, we recommend bringing a draft of your résumé and a list of scholarships you're interested in. No sign-up is needed, so just drop by. We hope this helps you find funding for next year.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the winners of several scholarships
options.B: To remind students of a tuition payment deadline
options.C: To invite students to a workshop on scholarship applications
options.D: To require seniors to reapply for financial aid

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告的核心是邀请学生参加关于奖学金申请的免费工作坊。A选项是错误目的，公告没有宣布任何奖学金获奖者。B选项是错误目的，公告与学费缴纳截止日期无关。D选项是过度且不符的内容，公告说工作坊对所有本科生开放，并未要求毕业班学生重新申请助学金。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A résumé draft and a list of scholarships
options.B: A signed financial aid award letter
options.C: Proof of enrollment from the registrar
options.D: A completed scholarship application form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告建议学生带上简历草稿和感兴趣的奖学金清单。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有要求带助学金批准信。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到注册处的在读证明。D选项是错误细节，工作坊是教大家如何申请，而不是要求带已完成的申请表。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The International Students Club is thrilled to invite you to our annual World Flavors Food Festival next Saturday from 12 p.m. to 5 p.m. on the Memorial Lawn. Student groups from more than fifteen countries will share traditional dishes, music, and craft demonstrations. Tasting tickets are just two dollars each and can be bought at the entrance, with all proceeds going toward next year's cultural events. If you'd like to volunteer at a booth, please email the club by Thursday so we can plan staffing. Come hungry, bring your friends, and enjoy an afternoon of food and culture.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit new members for the International Students Club
options.B: To announce a change to the dining hall menu
options.C: To explain how to apply for a study-abroad program
options.D: To invite students to a cultural food festival

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告的核心是邀请大家参加国际学生俱乐部举办的世界风味美食节。A选项是错误目的，公告招募的是当天的志愿者，而不是俱乐部新成员。B选项是错误目的，公告与食堂菜单的变更无关。C选项是错误目的，公告完全没有提到出国留学项目的申请。

questions.stem: How can students obtain tasting tickets?

options.A: By emailing the club before Thursday
options.B: By purchasing them for two dollars at the entrance
options.C: By volunteering at one of the food booths
options.D: By presenting a valid student ID card

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说明品尝券每张两美元，可在入口处购买。A选项是误置细节，周四前发邮件是为了报名当志愿者，而不是买券。C选项是误置细节，去摊位当志愿者与购买品尝券是两回事。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到需要出示学生证才能拿券。

items.situation: health insurance enrollment information session
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Student Health Office will hold an information session on next year's health insurance enrollment this Monday at 5 p.m. in Caldwell Hall, Room 3B. An advisor will explain the new plan options, what each one covers, and how to waive coverage if you already have qualifying insurance. Please remember that enrollment closes on September 30th, and students who miss the deadline will be automatically placed on the standard plan and billed for it. We strongly recommend that you review the comparison chart on the health portal before attending. Bring any questions about your current coverage, and we'll be happy to help.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a health insurance enrollment session
options.B: To announce that the standard health plan has been canceled
options.C: To collect insurance payments before September 30th
options.D: To advertise a new on-campus health clinic

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告的核心是通知学生即将举行的健康保险注册信息说明会。B选项是相反意图，公告说错过截止日期的学生会被自动安排到标准计划，而不是说标准计划被取消。C选项是错误目的，说明会是讲解选项，而不是当场收取保费。D选项是错误目的，公告没有提到任何新的校园诊所。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who miss the September 30th deadline?

options.A: They will lose all access to campus health services
options.B: They can enroll later without any extra cost
options.C: They will be charged for a plan they did not choose
options.D: They must schedule a private meeting with an advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说明错过截止日期的学生会被自动列入标准计划并被收费，由此可推断他们会为一个自己没有选择的计划付费。A选项是过度推断，公告并未说他们会失去所有校园医疗服务。B选项是错误细节，公告明确说错过截止日期会被自动收费，并非可以无额外费用补报。D选项是无关推断，公告没有提到必须与顾问单独预约会面。

items.situation: end-of-semester academic showcase with awards
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. The Honors Society is proud to host our end-of-semester Student Showcase next Thursday at 6 p.m. in the Maple Hall atrium. Students from every department will present their best projects from the term, and a panel of faculty will hand out awards for outstanding work in research, design, and community service. Light refreshments will be served throughout the evening. If you would like to display a project, please submit your title on our website by this Monday. Whether you are presenting or simply curious, come celebrate a great semester with us.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite people to a student project showcase
options.B: To explain how to join the Honors Society
options.C: To announce who has already won the awards
options.D: To describe recent renovations to Maple Hall

questions.explanation: 公告目的是邀请大家参加学生作品展示会，A 正确。B 入会方式未讲；C 奖项是活动当晚才颁，并非已揭晓；D 场馆翻修未涉及。

questions.stem: What must students do in order to display a project?

options.A: Pay a small entry fee in advance
options.B: Bring refreshments to share with guests
options.C: Submit a project title online by Monday
options.D: Arrive one hour early on Thursday

questions.explanation: 想展示作品须周一前在网站提交标题，C 正确。A 报名费未提；B 茶点由主办方提供，张冠李戴；D 提前一小时未要求。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention, students. Please note that the campus bookstore will be relocating to its new home on the ground floor of the Lewis Student Center. The current location in Foster Hall will close after this Friday, and the new store opens the following Monday at 9 a.m. The new space will offer expanded hours and a small café. During the move, online orders will continue as usual and can be picked up at the information desk. Be sure to update your bookmarks, since the store's web address will change as well.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: The opening of a brand-new campus café
options.B: The bookstore moving to a new location
options.C: A short closure for building repairs
options.D: Changes to the main library's hours

questions.explanation: 公告核心是书店搬迁到新地点，B 正确。A 咖啡馆只是附带细节，过窄；C 并非临时维修关闭，而是永久搬迁；D 图书馆时间无关。

questions.stem: How can students get their online orders during the move?

options.A: By having them shipped to a dorm room
options.B: By visiting the old Foster Hall store
options.C: By waiting until the new store opens
options.D: By picking them up at the information desk

questions.explanation: 搬迁期间网订商品在问询台领取，D 正确。A 寄到宿舍未提；B 老店将关闭，张冠李戴；C 须等新店开业与原文矛盾。

items.situation: senior capstone presentation schedule
items.announcement: This is a reminder for all graduating seniors about next week's capstone presentations. Sessions run Tuesday through Thursday in Room 210 of the Science Building, beginning promptly at 9 a.m. each day. Your assigned time slot has been emailed to you, and you must arrive at least fifteen minutes early to upload your slides onto the room's computer. Personal laptops will not be permitted at the podium. Each presentation is limited to twelve minutes, followed by questions from the faculty panel. If you have a scheduling conflict, please contact the department office before Friday.

questions.stem: What must seniors do when they arrive for their session?

options.A: Submit a printed copy of their slides
options.B: Sign in directly with the faculty panel
options.C: Upload their slides onto the room's computer
options.D: Connect their own personal laptops

questions.explanation: 到场须提前把幻灯片上传到教室电脑，C 正确。A 纸质版未要求；B 向评委签到张冠李戴；D 个人笔记本被明确禁止。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who bring their own laptops?

options.A: They will not be allowed to present from them
options.B: They must email their slides in advance
options.C: They will receive extra presentation time
options.D: They should sit closest to the panel

questions.explanation: 既然讲台不允许个人笔记本，自带笔记本者无法用其演示，A 正确。B 提前发邮件过度推断；C、D 加时和座位都无依据。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Hello, everyone! The Student Arts Council is excited to announce our first Spring Art Market, happening this Saturday from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. on the main quad. Student artists will sell handmade jewelry, prints, ceramics, and much more, with all proceeds going directly to the creators. Admission is completely free, so bring your friends and some cash, since not every booth can accept cards. In case of rain, the market will simply move indoors to the Union ballroom. A few tables are still available for sellers who sign up by Thursday afternoon.

questions.stem: What are visitors advised to bring to the market?

options.A: A reusable shopping bag
options.B: Their student ID for entry
options.C: A completed seller registration form
options.D: Cash, since some booths cannot take cards

questions.explanation: 提醒带现金，因为有摊位不收卡，D 正确。A 购物袋未提；B 入场免费无需 ID，张冠李戴；C 报名表是卖家的事。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the market if it rains?

options.A: It will be canceled for the entire day
options.B: It will still take place, but indoors
options.C: Admission will then require a small fee
options.D: Only sellers who take cards may attend

questions.explanation: 下雨则改到 Union 舞厅室内举行，故仍会进行，B 正确。A 取消与原文相反；C 收费、D 限制卖家都无依据。

items.situation: new student orientation schedule and requirements
items.announcement: Welcome, new students! This is an important reminder about next week's orientation. The opening session begins Monday at 8:30 a.m. in Carter Auditorium, and attendance is mandatory for all first-year students. Over the three days, you will meet your academic advisor, tour the campus, and complete your course registration. Please bring a photo ID and your enrollment letter in order to check in. Lunch is provided on the first day only. The full schedule is posted on the student portal, so review it carefully, as some sessions require signing up in advance.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform new students about orientation
options.B: To explain how to register for classes online
options.C: To introduce the academic advising staff
options.D: To tell students that orientation is optional

questions.explanation: 公告意在告知新生迎新安排，A 正确。B 选课只是其中一项，过窄；C 介绍顾问偏离主旨；D 与强制出席相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about some of the orientation sessions?

options.A: They are open only to academic advisors
options.B: They will be repeated again the next week
options.C: Students may not attend without signing up first
options.D: They provide a free lunch on every day

questions.explanation: 有些环节需提前报名，因此不报名可能无法参加，C 正确。A 仅限顾问无依据；B 下周重办过度推断；D 与午餐仅首日相反。

items.situation: temporary road closure and detour instructions
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. Due to emergency water-main repairs, University Drive between the library and the dining hall will be fully closed to all traffic from this Wednesday at 7 a.m. until Friday evening. During this time, please follow the marked detour along Chestnut Avenue, which loops behind the gymnasium before rejoining the main campus road. We'll also be relocating the Wednesday farmers' market from its usual spot on University Drive to the plaza outside the student center. Crews will be working with heavy machinery, so we ask drivers and cyclists to slow down and watch for flaggers directing traffic near the repair zone.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a temporary road closure and detour
options.B: To announce the cancellation of the farmers' market
options.C: To recruit volunteers for the water-main repairs
options.D: To encourage students to use University Drive

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告核心是因水管抢修，University Drive临时封闭并提供绕行路线，属于解释道路封闭与改道。B为wrong_purpose：农贸市场只是被搬到学生中心广场，并未取消，把次要信息当成了主旨。C为wrong_purpose：施工由工作人员负责，公告从未招募志愿者。D为reversed_intent：公告恰恰是要求大家避开被封闭的University Drive，与之相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the area near the repair zone?

options.A: It will reopen earlier than Friday evening
options.B: It is normally closed to cyclists
options.C: It may be hazardous to pass through quickly
options.D: It is located outside the student center

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告提到有重型机械作业，要求司机和骑行者减速并留意指挥交通的旗手，可推断该区域快速通过存在危险。A为over_inference：公告明确说封闭到周五傍晚，没有任何提前开放的依据。B为wrong_detail：公告并未说该路平时禁止骑行，只是提醒骑行者减速。D为wrong_detail：搬到学生中心广场的是农贸市场，而非维修区，属于错位的细节。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the schedule for this semester's honors thesis oral defenses has now been posted outside the department office in Harrow Hall. Defenses will take place over three days, beginning next Tuesday, in seminar room 204. Each candidate has been assigned a forty-minute slot, and you'll find your exact time on the printed schedule. Please arrive at least fifteen minutes early and bring two printed copies of your final thesis for the committee. We'd also like to remind students that the defenses are open to the public, so feel free to invite friends and family to attend.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how thesis grades are calculated
options.B: To inform students that the defense schedule is posted
options.C: To recruit faculty members for the committee
options.D: To announce a change in the department office location

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告中心是通知荣誉论文答辩的日程已经张贴，并说明相关安排，属于告知日程已发布。A为wrong_purpose：公告完全没有涉及成绩如何评定。C为wrong_purpose：委员会成员已定，公告未招募教师。D为wrong_detail：公告只是说日程贴在系办公室外，并未说办公室搬迁。

questions.stem: What are candidates required to bring to their defense?

options.A: A signed permission form from an advisor
options.B: A laptop with their presentation slides
options.C: Two letters of recommendation
options.D: Two printed copies of their final thesis

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：公告明确要求每位答辩者带两份打印好的最终论文交给委员会。A为related_but_not_stated：导师签字表是合理但公告未提及的内容。B为related_but_not_stated：演示幻灯片在答辩中常见，但本公告并未要求带笔记本电脑。C为wrong_detail：公告里出现的是“两份论文”，把“两份”这个数字错配到了推荐信上。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students. Beginning this Monday, the campus shuttle will follow a new route while construction continues on Maple Street. Instead of stopping at the east gate, the shuttle will now pick up and drop off riders at the temporary stop in front of the recreation center. All other stops along the route will stay the same, and the shuttle will keep running every fifteen minutes from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. We expect this change to last about a month. Updated route maps are posted at every stop and on the transportation page of the university website.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A new fee for riding the campus shuttle
options.B: The closing of the recreation center
options.C: A change to the campus shuttle route
options.D: An increase in shuttle service hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告主旨是因Maple Street施工，校园班车改走新路线，东门停靠点改到康乐中心前。A为related_but_not_stated：公告完全没有提到任何车费。B为wrong_detail：康乐中心是临时上下车点，并未关闭。D为wrong_detail：班车仍是每十五分钟一班、7点到21点，时间没有增加。

questions.stem: Where will the shuttle now stop instead of the east gate?

options.A: In front of the recreation center
options.B: On Maple Street near the construction
options.C: At the main library entrance
options.D: Behind the university dining hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告明确说班车不再停东门，改在康乐中心前的临时站点上下客。B为wrong_detail：Maple Street正在施工，恰恰是班车要避开的地方。C为related_but_not_stated：图书馆是合理地点但公告未提及。D为related_but_not_stated：餐厅同样未在公告中出现。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Career Center is excited to host our free LinkedIn Profile Photo Day this Thursday from 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the lobby of Bryson Hall. A professional photographer will be on site to take polished headshots that you can use on LinkedIn and other job applications, all at no cost. We recommend dressing in business attire to make the best impression. No appointment is needed, but spots fill up quickly, so we suggest arriving early. Photos will be emailed to you within two business days, so please be sure to check your university inbox.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a workshop on writing resumes
options.B: To remind students to update their LinkedIn profiles
options.C: To recruit a photographer for the Career Center
options.D: To promote a free professional headshot event

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：公告主旨是宣传职业中心举办的免费LinkedIn证件照活动，由专业摄影师拍摄头像。A为wrong_purpose：公告是拍照活动，没有简历写作工作坊。B为too_narrow：更新LinkedIn只是照片用途之一，并非公告目的。C为reversed_intent：摄影师是已请好来服务学生的，公告并非招募摄影师。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do for the event?

options.A: Book an appointment online in advance
options.B: Wear business attire to the session
options.C: Bring a printed copy of their resume
options.D: Pay a small fee for the headshot

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告建议学生穿正装以留下最好印象。A为wrong_detail：公告明说无需预约，与此相反。C为related_but_not_stated：带简历是合理但公告未提及的做法。D为wrong_detail：活动是免费的，公告强调at no cost，不存在收费。

items.situation: grand reopening of a renovated gallery
items.announcement: We're excited to announce that the newly renovated Westfield Gallery will hold its grand reopening this Saturday at 1 p.m. on the second floor of the arts building. After nearly a year of renovations, the gallery now features improved lighting, a climate-controlled exhibition room, and a spacious new lobby. The opening celebration will include a guided tour of the inaugural student photography exhibit, along with light refreshments. Admission is free, but because seating for the opening remarks is limited, we encourage you to reserve a spot through the gallery's online form. We hope to see you there.

questions.stem: What new feature does the renovated gallery now have?

options.A: A climate-controlled exhibition room
options.B: A rooftop sculpture garden
options.C: An expanded gift shop
options.D: A second-floor coffee bar

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告明确说翻新后的画廊新增了温控展厅、改善的照明和宽敞的大厅。B为related_but_not_stated：屋顶雕塑花园是合理但公告未提及的设施。C为related_but_not_stated：礼品店同样未在公告中出现。D为misattributed_detail：公告里提到的是“二楼”这个位置和“清淡茶点”，这里把二楼错配到了一个并不存在的咖啡吧上。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the opening remarks?

options.A: They will be given by a famous artist
options.B: They will be held outside the arts building
options.C: Not everyone who attends may get a seat
options.D: They will be recorded and posted online

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告说开幕致辞的座位有限并建议提前在线预约，可推断并非所有到场者都能有座位。A为over_inference：公告未提及致辞人身份，更没说是名家。B为wrong_detail：活动在艺术楼二楼举行，并非楼外。D为over_inference：公告只提到在线预约表单，从未说致辞会录制并上传。

items.situation: new bike-share station locations
items.announcement: Good morning, students. We're excited to announce that the campus bike-share program is expanding with three brand-new docking stations opening next Monday. You'll find them outside the Library, near the South Dining Hall, and beside the Engineering Building. Each station holds twenty bikes, and unlocking one still works through the same mobile app you already use. Please note that the old station behind the gymnasium is being retired, so any bikes left there after Sunday evening will be relocated automatically. To celebrate the launch, the first thirty minutes of every ride will be free during opening week. Be sure to update the app before Monday so the new stations appear on your map.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce new bike-share station locations
options.B: To explain how to download the app
options.C: To apologize for a gymnasium closure
options.D: To discourage students from cycling

questions.explanation: 正确答案A。公告的核心是宣布下周一新增三个共享单车停靠站，并说明位置和优惠。B只是其中一个细节（更新app），过于狭隘，不是主要目的。C错误，公告并未为体育馆关闭道歉，旧站只是退役。D与公告意图相反，公告是在鼓励而非劝阻骑行。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the station behind the gymnasium?

options.A: It will hold twenty additional bikes
options.B: It offers the longest free rides
options.C: It will no longer be in service
options.D: It is the busiest station on campus

questions.explanation: 正确答案C。公告说体育馆后的旧站正在被retired（退役），周日后留在那里的车会被自动转移，可推断它将停止运营。A错误，二十辆是新站的容量，与旧站无关。B错误，免费时长是针对开业周的所有骑行，并非该站特有。D无任何依据，公告从未提及它最繁忙。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Attention students. The International Club is thrilled to invite you to our annual Cultural Food Festival this Saturday on the main lawn from noon until 4 p.m. Students from over twenty countries will be serving homemade dishes, and there will be live music and traditional dance performances throughout the afternoon. Admission is completely free, but if you'd like to taste the food, you'll need to purchase a ticket booklet at the entrance. Each booklet costs five dollars and includes ten tasting coupons. Please bring your own reusable cup, since we're trying to keep the event waste-free this year. We hope to see you there for an afternoon of delicious flavors and culture.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A new international student orientation
options.B: An upcoming cultural food festival
options.C: A fundraiser for the music department
options.D: A change to dining hall menus

items.situation: building wing closure for asbestos removal

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: Attention students. items.situation: mock interview sessions with alumni volunteers

Sessions run from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. in the Hartwell Conference Room, and each lasts about thirty minutes. To reserve a slot, you must upload a current copy of your resume through the Career Center portal by Monday evening. options.B: Email the Career Center directly

items.situation: winter gear swap with voucher system
items.announcement: Attention students. The Outdoor Recreation Office is hosting its annual Winter Gear Swap this Saturday from noon to 5 p.m. in the Field House lobby. You may then redeem those vouchers for gear that other students have brought in. Please note that you cannot take an item without first donating one, so there's no cash exchange involved. Any unclaimed gear left at the end of the day will be donated to a local shelter. We hope this helps everyone stay warm without buying new equipment.

items.situation: third-floor study lounge closing for ceiling pipe repair
